Off Calendar Jul-26-2019 Continued To Nov-19-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition 1. To Determine Construction Of Trust; 2. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments; 3. For Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Apr-23-2019 Continued To Jul-30-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Jefferson Barboni.

The Court noted that nobody is here for the other side. Mr. Freedman stated that he has conducted discovery, that he is trying to get the Respondent's deposition done, that they have agreed to do private mediation and that they have agreed to a continuance for further status. The Petition to Determine Construction of Trust, etc. is continued to July 30, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Parties are to submit a joint status statement by July 23, 2019 telling the Court where things stand. If the matter is not settled, the Parties need to contemplate what needs to happen to bring this matter to resolution.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.

Petition 1. To Determine Construction Of Trust; 2. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments; 3. For Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Continued To Apr-23-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition 1. To Determine Construction Of Trust; 2. To Determine Validity Of Purported Trust Amendments; 3. For Financial Elder Abuse
Off Calendar Feb-19-2019 Continued To Apr-09-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michael Freedman for and with Jefferson Barboni.
Jay Greene for and with Roman Scanlon.

The Court noted that there is a pending civil matter seeking related and overlapping relief and that there is some suggestion of filing of a motion to consolidate. Mr. Greene stated that he filed a motion to consolidate in Department 501 with a hearing date of March 14, 2019. Mr. Freedman stated that he is not opposing consolidation, but he does not think that the Housing Court is appropriate and that he may file a motion here. The Petition to Determine Construction of Trust, etc. is continued to April 9, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
